channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Faster Acquisition Pathway Considered for Artificial Intelligence - A Game-Changer for Defense Department?
item.description: The US Defense Department explores the possibility of creating a separate acquisition pathway or sub-path specifically designed for artificial intelligence, aiming to accelerate its development and delivery.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
